Ingredients: Rice, urad dal, salt, water, oil
Cooking Instructions: Ferment batter, spread on tawa, cook until crispy.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Soak rice and urad dal separately for 6 hours. 2. Grind them into a smooth batter. 3. Mix the batter, add salt, and ferment overnight. 4. Heat a dosa tawa, spread the batter thinly, and cook until crispy. 5. Serve with chutney and sambar.

Cooking Instructions: Ferment batter, steam in idli molds.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Soak rice and urad dal separately for 6 hours. 2. Grind them into a smooth batter. 3. Mix the batter, add salt, and ferment overnight. 4. Pour the batter into idli molds and steam for 10-12 minutes. 5. Serve with chutney and sambar.

Ingredients: Whole wheat flour, water, salt, oil for frying
Cooking Instructions: Knead the dough, roll into small discs, deep-fry until golden and puffy
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Mix flour, salt, and water to form a soft dough. 2. Divide into small balls and roll them into circles. 3. Heat oil in a pan and deep-fry until golden and puffy. 4. Drain excess oil and serve hot.

Ingredients: Whole wheat flour, water, salt, oil (optional)
Cooking Instructions: Knead the dough, roll into discs, cook on a tawa until golden brown
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Mix flour, salt, and water to form a soft dough. 2. Rest the dough for 20 minutes. 3. Divide into small balls and roll into circles. 4. Cook on a hot tawa, flipping until brown spots appear. 5. Apply oil or butter if desired.

Ingredients: Rice, moong dal, jaggery, ghee, cashews, raisins, cardamom
Cooking Instructions: Cook rice and dal, mix with jaggery syrup, add ghee-roasted nuts and cardamom
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Dry roast moong dal until aromatic. 2. Cook rice and moong dal together in water. 3. Melt jaggery with little water and strain. 4. Mix jaggery syrup with cooked rice and dal. 5. Add ghee-roasted cashews, raisins, and cardamom. 6. Stir well and serve warm.

Ingredients: Urad dal, salt, curry leaves, green chilies
Cooking Instructions: Grind dal, shape into rings, deep-fry until golden.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Soak urad dal for 4 hours. 2. Grind into a thick batter. 3. Add chopped ginger, green chilies, and salt. 4. Shape into small rounds with a hole in the center. 5. Deep fry until golden brown. Serve with chutney.

Ingredients: Toor dal, tamarind, veggies, sambar powder
Cooking Instructions: Boil dal, add tamarind and veggies, simmer with spices.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Pressure cook dal with turmeric. 2. Cook vegetables (like drumsticks, carrots, and onions) in tamarind water. 3. Add sambar powder, cooked dal, and salt. 4. Temper with mustard seeds, curry leaves, and asafoetida. 5. Serve hot with rice or idli.

Ingredients: Rice, moong dal, pepper, ghee, cashews
Cooking Instructions: Cook rice and dal, temper with ghee and spices.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook rice and moong dal in a pressure cooker. 2. In a pan, temper cumin seeds, pepper, ginger, and curry leaves in ghee. 3. Mix the tempering with the cooked rice and dal. 4. Add salt and cook for 5 minutes. 5. Serve hot with chutney or sambar.

Cooking Instructions: Ferment batter, cook in an appam pan until fluffy.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Soak rice and urad dal for 6 hours. 2. Grind into a smooth batter with coconut milk. 3. Add salt and ferment overnight. 4. Heat an appam pan, pour the batter, and swirl to spread. 5. Cook until the edges are crispy and the center is soft. Serve with stew.

Cooking Instructions: Blend rice with coconut, make thin dosas on tawa.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Soak rice for 3-4 hours. 2. Grind into a smooth, watery batter. 3. Add salt and mix well. 4. Heat a dosa tawa, pour a ladle of batter, and spread thinly. 5. Cook for a minute and fold. Serve with chutney or curry.

Ingredients: Tamarind, tomatoes, rasam powder, toor dal
Cooking Instructions: Boil tamarind, add tomatoes and spices, temper.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Boil tamarind water with tomatoes, rasam powder, and salt. 2. Add cooked dal and mix well. 3. Temper with mustard seeds, cumin seeds, curry leaves, and garlic in ghee. 4. Add the tempering to the rasam. 5. Garnish with coriander leaves and serve hot.

Ingredients: Mixed vegetables, coconut, yogurt, curry leaves
Cooking Instructions: Boil veggies, mix with coconut paste, add yogurt.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cut vegetables (like carrots, beans, and drumsticks) into long pieces. 2. Cook the vegetables with turmeric and salt. 3. Grind coconut, green chilies, and cumin into a paste. 4. Add the paste to the cooked vegetables. 5. Mix well and cook for 5 minutes. Serve with rice.

Cooking Instructions: Steam rice flour layers with coconut.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Mix rice flour with salt and water to make a crumbly mixture. 2. Layer the mixture with grated coconut in a puttu maker. 3. Steam for 5-7 minutes. 4. Serve with kadala curry or banana.

Cooking Instructions: Cook chickpeas, make coconut gravy, simmer.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Soak black chickpeas overnight and pressure cook. 2. Sauté onions, ginger, garlic, and green chilies. 3. Add curry leaves, tomatoes, and kadala curry powder. 4. Add cooked chickpeas and coconut milk. 5. Simmer for 10 minutes. Serve with puttu or appam.

Cooking Instructions: Pour batter thickly, top with veggies, cook on tawa.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Use fermented dosa batter. 2. Heat a tawa, pour a ladle of batter, and spread thickly. 3. Top with chopped onions, tomatoes, and green chilies. 4. Cook until the base is golden brown. 5. Flip and cook the other side. Serve with chutney.

Ingredients: Dosa batter, onions, mustard seeds, curry leaves
Cooking Instructions: Pour batter in paniyaram pan, cook till golden.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Use fermented dosa batter. 2. Heat a paniyaram pan, add oil to each mold. 3. Pour batter into each mold. 4. Cook until golden brown on both sides. 5. Serve with chutney or sambar.

Ingredients: Rice, mixed dals, chilies, curry leaves
Cooking Instructions: Soak, grind, make thick dosas on tawa.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Soak rice, dal, and spices for 4 hours. 2. Grind into a coarse batter. 3. Add chopped onions, curry leaves, and salt. 4. Spread the batter on a hot tawa and cook until crispy. 5. Serve with avial or chutney.

Ingredients: Basmati rice, chicken, whole spices, ghee
Cooking Instructions: Cook chicken, layer with rice, dum cook.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Marinate chicken with spices and yogurt. 2. Cook rice with whole spices until 70% done. 3. Layer the marinated chicken and rice in a pot. 4. Seal with dough and cook on low heat (dum) for 20 minutes. 5. Serve with raita and salad.

Cooking Instructions: Cook chicken with masala, simmer until rich.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Marinate chicken with Chettinad masala and yogurt. 2. Sauté onions, ginger, garlic, and tomatoes. 3. Add marinated chicken and cook until tender. 4. Add coconut milk and simmer. 5. Garnish with coriander leaves. Serve with rice or parotta.

Cooking Instructions: Cook besan with sugar and ghee till set.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Heat ghee in a pan. 2. Mix besan, sugar, and water in another pan. 3. Cook until the mixture thickens. 4. Add hot ghee gradually and stir continuously. 5. Pour into a greased tray, cool, and cut into pieces.

Cooking Instructions: Cook dal, add coconut paste, temper.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook moong dal with turmeric and water. 2. Temper mustard seeds, curry leaves, and garlic in ghee. 3. Add the tempering to the cooked dal. 4. Add coconut milk and salt. 5. Simmer for 5 minutes. Serve with rice.

Cooking Instructions: Simmer milk with rice and sweeteners.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook rice or vermicelli in milk. 2. Add sugar and cardamom powder. 3. Cook until thickened. 4. Fry nuts and raisins in ghee. 5. Add the fried nuts to the payasam. Serve warm or cold.

Cooking Instructions: Roast coconut, grind, cook with tamarind gravy.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Roast coconut, coriander seeds, and red chilies until brown. 2. Grind into a paste. 3. Cook vegetables (like shallots and drumsticks) in tamarind water. 4. Add the ground paste and salt. 5. Simmer for 10 minutes. Serve with rice.

Cooking Instructions: Grind with water, temper with mustard seeds.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Grind coconut, roasted chana dal, green chilies, and ginger into a paste. 2. Add water to adjust consistency. 3. Temper mustard seeds, curry leaves, and red chilies in oil. 4. Add the tempering to the chutney. 5. Serve with dosa or idli.

Cooking Instructions: Cook tomatoes with spices until thick.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook tomatoes until soft. 2. Add tamarind water, jaggery, and salt. 3. Temper mustard seeds, curry leaves, and asafoetida in oil. 4. Add the tempering to the tomato mixture. 5. Simmer for 5 minutes. Serve with rice or dosa.

Cooking Instructions: Cook tamarind paste, mix with cooked rice.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook rice and let it cool. 2. Prepare tamarind paste with spices and jaggery. 3. Temper mustard seeds, curry leaves, and peanuts in oil. 4. Mix the tamarind paste and tempering with the rice. 5. Serve with papad or curd.

Cooking Instructions: Tear parotta, stir-fry with masala and eggs.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Shred parotta into small pieces. 2. Sauté onions, tomatoes, and spices. 3. Add shredded parotta and mix well. 4. Add beaten eggs (optional) and cook until dry. 5. Garnish with coriander leaves. Serve hot.

Cooking Instructions: Cook veggies with coconut-based masala.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook mixed vegetables (like carrots, beans, and peas) with turmeric and salt. 2. Grind coconut, cashews, and spices into a paste. 3. Add the paste to the cooked vegetables. 4. Simmer for 10 minutes. 5. Serve with parotta or rice.

Cooking Instructions: Knead, roll, fold, and cook on tawa.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Knead maida, egg, and water into a soft dough. 2. Divide into small balls and roll into thin sheets. 3. Fold the sheets into layers and roll again. 4. Cook on a tawa with ghee until golden brown. 5. Serve with kurma or curry.

Ingredients: Rice, toor dal, tamarind, Bisi Bele spice mix
Cooking Instructions: Cook dal, rice, tamarind, mix with spice blend.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook rice and dal with vegetables. 2. Prepare bisi bele bath powder with spices. 3. Add tamarind water, jaggery, and salt to the cooked rice and dal. 4. Mix well and cook for 10 minutes. 5. Temper with mustard seeds, curry leaves, and cashews. Serve with papad.

Ingredients: Vermicelli, onion, mustard seeds, curry leaves
Cooking Instructions: Roast vermicelli, cook with water and spices.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Roast vermicelli in ghee until golden. 2. Sauté mustard seeds, urad dal, onions, and green chilies. 3. Add water and salt, bring to a boil. 4. Add roasted vermicelli and cook until soft. 5. Garnish with coriander leaves. Serve with chutney.

Cooking Instructions: Cook flour with water, shape into balls.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Boil water in a pan. 2. Add ragi flour gradually and stir continuously. 3. Cook until the mixture thickens. 4. Shape into balls using wet hands. 5. Serve with sambar or curry.

Cooking Instructions: Marinate, slow-cook on dum.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Marinate chicken with spices and yogurt. 2. Sauté onions, ginger, garlic, and tomatoes. 3. Add marinated chicken and cook until tender. 4. Seal the pot with dough and cook on low heat (dum) for 20 minutes. 5. Garnish with coriander leaves. Serve with naan or rice.

Cooking Instructions: Cook tamarind gravy with vegetables and spices.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Prepare tamarind water and add sambar powder. 2. Cook vegetables (like drumsticks and brinjal) in the tamarind water. 3. Temper mustard seeds, fenugreek seeds, and curry leaves in oil. 4. Add the tempering to the kuzhambu. 5. Simmer for 10 minutes. Serve with rice.

Cooking Instructions: Stir-fry veggies, add coconut and tempering.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook vegetables (like beans or carrots) with turmeric and salt. 2. Temper mustard seeds, urad dal, and curry leaves in oil. 3. Add grated coconut and sauté. 4. Mix with the cooked vegetables. 5. Serve as a side dish.

Cooking Instructions: Cook pumpkin, blend coconut, temper.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook pumpkin and black-eyed peas with turmeric and salt. 2. Grind coconut, cumin, and green chilies into a paste. 3. Add the paste to the cooked vegetables. 4. Temper mustard seeds and curry leaves in coconut oil. 5. Add the tempering to the erissery. Serve with rice.

Cooking Instructions: Slice bananas, deep-fry until crispy.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Slice raw bananas thinly. 2. Soak in turmeric water for 10 minutes. 3. Heat oil and fry the slices until crispy. 4. Drain excess oil and sprinkle salt. 5. Cool and store in an airtight container.

Ingredients: Rice flour, urad dal flour, butter, sesame seeds
Cooking Instructions: Knead dough, shape, deep-fry.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Mix rice flour, urad dal flour, cumin seeds, and butter. 2. Add water to make a dough. 3. Use a murukku press to shape the dough into spirals. 4. Deep fry until golden brown. 5. Cool and store in an airtight container.

Ingredients: Rice flour, urad dal flour, spices
Cooking Instructions: Make dough, flatten, deep-fry.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Mix rice flour, urad dal flour, butter, and spices. 2. Add water to make a dough. 3. Shape into small discs and flatten. 4. Deep fry until crispy. 5. Cool and store in an airtight container.

Cooking Instructions: Grind soaked dal, make thin dosas.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Soak green gram dal for 4 hours. 2. Grind into a smooth batter with ginger and green chilies. 3. Add salt and mix well. 4. Spread the batter on a hot tawa and cook until crispy. 5. Serve with ginger chutney.

Cooking Instructions: Boil and mash, mix with coconut paste.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Boil tapioca (kappa) with turmeric and salt. 2. Mash the cooked tapioca. 3. Temper mustard seeds, curry leaves, and green chilies in coconut oil. 4. Add the tempering to the mashed tapioca. 5. Serve with fish curry or chutney.

Cooking Instructions: Steam rice flour dumplings with coconut filling.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Prepare rice flour dough with water and salt. 2. Shape the dough into small cups. 3. Fill the cups with a mixture of jaggery and coconut. 4. Steam the kadubu for 10-15 minutes. 5. Serve warm.

Cooking Instructions: Make dough, stuff with sweet dal filling, cook.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Prepare a dough with maida and water. 2. Prepare a filling with chana dal, jaggery, and cardamom. 3. Roll the dough into small discs, add the filling, and seal. 4. Roll again into thin discs and cook on a tawa. 5. Serve with ghee or milk.

Cooking Instructions: Spread dosa, stuff with potato masala.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Prepare dosa batter (same as regular dosa). 2. Spread a layer of red chutney on the dosa. 3. Add potato masala in the center. 4. Fold the dosa and cook until crispy. 5. Serve with coconut chutney and sambar.

Cooking Instructions: Mix, pour batter in oil, deep-fry.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Soak rice and urad dal for 4 hours. 2. Grind into a smooth batter with jaggery and cardamom. 3. Add chopped banana and coconut pieces. 4. Heat a paniyaram pan, add ghee to each mold. 5. Pour the batter and cook until golden brown. Serve warm.

Cooking Instructions: Roast rava, cook with veggies and masala.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Roast rava in ghee until aromatic. 2. Add water, salt, and cook until the rava is soft. 3. Add coconut milk and mix well. 4. Temper mustard seeds, curry leaves, and green chilies in ghee. 5. Add the tempering to the kharabath. Serve with chutney.

Cooking Instructions: Cook tamarind paste with ginger and jaggery.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Sauté ginger, green chilies, and curry leaves in oil. 2. Add tamarind water, jaggery, and salt. 3. Cook until the mixture thickens. 4. Add roasted fenugreek powder. 5. Cool and store in an airtight container. Serve as a side dish.

Cooking Instructions: Coat mashed potato balls in batter, deep-fry.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Mix besan, rice flour, and spices with water to make a thick batter. 2. Shape into small balls. 3. Deep fry until golden brown. 4. Drain excess oil. 5. Serve with chutney or tea.

Cooking Instructions: Roast rava, cook with sugar syrup.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Roast rava in ghee until aromatic. 2. Add water, sugar, and cook until the rava is soft. 3. Add food color (optional) and cardamom powder. 4. Add fried nuts and raisins. 5. Serve warm.

Cooking Instructions: Grind dal, shape, deep-fry.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Soak chana dal and urad dal for 4 hours. 2. Grind into a coarse batter with green chilies and ginger. 3. Add chopped onions, curry leaves, and salt. 4. Shape into small discs and deep fry. 5. Serve with chutney.

Cooking Instructions: Cook tamarind broth with spices.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Prepare tamarind water and add sambar powder. 2. Cook vegetables (like drumsticks and brinjal) in the tamarind water. 3. Temper mustard seeds, fenugreek seeds, and curry leaves in oil. 4. Add the tempering to the kuzhambu. 5. Simmer for 10 minutes. Serve with rice.

Cooking Instructions: Cook tamarind broth with fenugreek.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Prepare tamarind water and add fenugreek powder. 2. Cook vegetables (like drumsticks and brinjal) in the tamarind water. 3. Temper mustard seeds, fenugreek seeds, and curry leaves in oil. 4. Add the tempering to the kuzhambu. 5. Simmer for 10 minutes. Serve with rice.

Cooking Instructions: Boil chickpeas, temper, add coconut.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Soak chickpeas overnight and pressure cook. 2. Temper mustard seeds, urad dal, and curry leaves in oil. 3

Ingredients: Rice, curd, mustard seeds, green chilies
Cooking Instructions: Mix rice with curd, temper with mustard seeds.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook rice and let it cool. 2. Mix curd (yogurt) with the rice. 3. Temper mustard seeds, urad dal, curry leaves, and green chilies in oil. 4. Add the tempering to the curd rice. 5. Garnish with grated carrots or pomegranate seeds. Serve chilled.

Cooking Instructions: Boil with tamarind, temper with spices.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Boil tomatoes, tamarind water, and rasam powder. 2. Add cooked dal and salt. 3. Temper mustard seeds, cumin seeds, curry leaves, and garlic in ghee. 4. Add the tempering to the rasam. 5. Garnish with coriander leaves. Serve hot with rice.

Ingredients: Basmati rice, chicken, onions, tomatoes, yogurt, biryani masala, ginger-garlic paste, green chilies, saffron, milk, ghee, whole spices (bay leaf, cloves, cardamom, cinnamon, coriander, mint
Cooking Instructions: Marinate chicken, cook with spices, layer with partially cooked rice, and dum cook (slow cook)
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Marinate chicken with yogurt, spices, and ginger-garlic paste for at least 30 minutes. 2. Cook onions, tomatoes, and marinated chicken in a pan until tender. 3. Partially cook basmati rice with whole spices. 4. Layer the chicken and rice in a pot, adding saffron milk, ghee, and herbs. 5. Dum cook (seal the pot and slow cook) for 20-30 minutes. 6. Serve hot with raita.

Ingredients: Basmati rice, mutton, onions, tomatoes, yogurt, biryani masala, ginger-garlic paste, green chilies, saffron, milk, ghee, whole spices (bay leaf, cloves, cardamom, cinnamon, coriander, mint
Cooking Instructions: Marinate mutton, pressure cook until tender, layer with rice, and dum cook
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Marinate mutton with yogurt, spices, and ginger-garlic paste for at least 1 hour. 2. Pressure cook mutton with onions, tomatoes, and spices until tender. 3. Partially cook basmati rice with whole spices. 4. Layer the mutton and rice in a pot, adding saffron milk, ghee, and herbs. 5. Dum cook (seal the pot and slow cook) for 30 minutes. 6. Serve hot with raita and boiled eggs.

Ingredients: Rice, coconut, green chilies, curry leaves
Cooking Instructions: Cook rice, mix with tempered coconut.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook rice and let it cool. 2. Grind coconut, green chilies, and cumin into a coarse paste. 3. Temper mustard seeds, urad dal, curry leaves, and cashews in oil. 4. Mix the coconut paste and tempering with the rice. 5. Serve with papad or pickle.

Ingredients: Mixed vegetables (carrot, beans, potato, peas), coconut, green chilies, yogurt, cashews, garam masala, poppy seeds, ginger-garlic paste, whole spices (bay leaf, cardamom, cinnamon, coriander, curry leaves
Cooking Instructions: Cook vegetables with coconut paste and spices until thick gravy forms
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Grind coconut, green chilies, cashews, and poppy seeds into a paste. 2. Sauté onions, ginger-garlic paste, and whole spices in a pan. 3. Add chopped vegetables and cook for a few minutes. 4. Add the coconut paste, yogurt, and water, then simmer. 5. Cook until vegetables are tender and gravy thickens. 6. Garnish with coriander and serve hot.

Ingredients: Potatoes, onions, green chilies, mustard seeds, curry leaves, turmeric, salt, oil
Cooking Instructions: Boil and mash potatoes, cook with tempered spices and onions
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Boil potatoes, peel, and mash them coarsely. 2. Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds, curry leaves, and green chilies. 3. Add onions and sauté until soft. 4. Add mashed potatoes, turmeric, and salt. 5. Mix well, cook for a few minutes, and serve.

Ingredients: Chicken, onions, tomatoes, ginger-garlic paste, garam masala, chili powder, coriander powder, yogurt, whole spices (cardamom, cloves, cinnamon, curry leaves
Cooking Instructions: Cook chicken with a spiced onion-tomato base to make a thick gravy
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Heat oil, sauté whole spices, onions, and ginger-garlic paste. 2. Add chopped tomatoes and cook until soft. 3. Add chicken pieces, spices, and yogurt, mix well. 4. Add water and simmer until chicken is tender. 5. Garnish with coriander leaves and serve hot.

Ingredients: Mutton, onions, tomatoes, ginger-garlic paste, garam masala, chili powder, coriander powder, whole spices (bay leaf, cloves, cinnamon, coconut paste, curry leaves
Cooking Instructions: Pressure cook mutton with spices and blend with a thick masala gravy
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Heat oil, sauté whole spices, onions, and ginger-garlic paste. 2. Add tomatoes, cook until soft. 3. Add mutton, spices, and cook in a pressure cooker until tender. 4. Add coconut paste and simmer to thicken. 5. Garnish with coriander and serve hot.

Ingredients: Fish fillets, chili powder, turmeric, lemon juice, ginger-garlic paste, salt, oil
Cooking Instructions: Marinate fish and shallow fry until crispy
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Mix chili powder, turmeric, salt, lemon juice, and ginger-garlic paste. 2. Apply marinade to fish fillets and rest for 30 minutes. 3. Heat oil in a pan, shallow fry fish until golden brown. 4. Serve hot with lemon wedges and onion rings.

Ingredients: Fish, tamarind, onions, tomatoes, garlic, mustard seeds, curry leaves, chili powder, coriander powder, turmeric, coconut milk
Cooking Instructions: Simmer fish in a spicy tamarind-based gravy until tender
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Heat oil, add mustard seeds, curry leaves, and garlic. 2. Add onions and tomatoes, sauté until soft. 3. Add tamarind extract, spices, and water. 4. Bring to a boil, add fish pieces, and cook until done. 5. Finish with coconut milk and simmer. 6. Serve hot with rice.

Ingredients: Chicken, yogurt, red chili powder, turmeric, ginger-garlic paste, curry leaves, green chilies, cornflour, lemon juice, oil
Cooking Instructions: Marinate chicken, deep-fry until crispy, and toss in spicy seasoning
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Marinate chicken with yogurt, chili powder, turmeric, and ginger-garlic paste for 1 hour. 2. Coat with cornflour and deep-fry until golden. 3. Heat oil, add curry leaves and green chilies. 4. Toss fried chicken in seasoning. 5. Serve hot with lemon wedges.

Cooking Instructions: Boil pasta, mix with sauce and season.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Boil pasta in salted water until al dente. 2. Sauté garlic, onions, and tomatoes in olive oil. 3. Add cooked pasta to the sauce. 4. Toss well and garnish with cheese. 5. Serve hot.

Cooking Instructions: Cook meat, assemble with toppings in tortillas.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook seasoned ground meat or veggies. 2. Warm taco shells. 3. Fill shells with the cooked filling. 4. Top with lettuce, cheese, and salsa. 5. Serve with lime wedges.

Cooking Instructions: Blend, shape, deep-fry until golden.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Soak chickpeas overnight. 2. Blend with herbs and spices into a coarse mixture. 3. Shape into balls and deep fry. 4. Serve in pita bread with tahini sauce.

Ingredients: Noodles, broth, meat, egg, soy sauce
Cooking Instructions: Cook broth, add noodles & toppings, serve hot.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Boil ramen noodles. 2. Prepare broth with soy sauce, miso, or tonkotsu base. 3. Add toppings like boiled eggs, pork, and veggies. 4. Assemble noodles, broth, and toppings. 5. Serve hot.

Cooking Instructions: Cook rice with broth, add proteins and spices.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Sauté onions, garlic, and bell peppers in olive oil. 2. Add rice and saffron, cook briefly. 3. Add broth, seafood, and chorizo. 4. Simmer until rice is cooked. 5. Garnish with lemon wedges.

Cooking Instructions: Fold dough with butter, roll, bake.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Prepare dough with flour, butter, yeast, and milk. 2. Fold and roll the dough multiple times to create layers. 3. Shape into crescents and proof. 4. Bake at 200°C until golden. 5. Serve warm.

Cooking Instructions: Blend all ingredients until smooth.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Blend cooked chickpeas, tahini, garlic, lemon juice, and olive oil. 2. Add water for desired consistency. 3. Season with salt and cumin. 4. Garnish with paprika and olive oil. 5. Serve with pita bread.

Cooking Instructions: Fill tortilla, wrap tightly, serve.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook seasoned rice, beans, and meat. 2. Warm a tortilla. 3. Layer rice, beans, meat, cheese, and salsa. 4. Roll tightly into a burrito. 5. Serve with guacamole.

Cooking Instructions: Fill tortilla with cheese, grill until golden.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Place cheese and fillings (chicken, veggies) on a tortilla. 2. Top with another tortilla. 3. Cook on a skillet until cheese melts. 4. Cut into wedges. 5. Serve with salsa and sour cream.

Cooking Instructions: Roll fillings in rice paper, serve fresh.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Soak rice paper in water until soft. 2. Fill with veggies, noodles, and shrimp. 3. Roll tightly. 4. Serve with dipping sauce.

Cooking Instructions: Stir-fry noodles with sauce and toppings.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Soak rice noodles. 2. Sauté shrimp, tofu, and eggs. 3. Add noodles, tamarind sauce, and fish sauce. 4. Toss well and garnish with peanuts. 5. Serve with lime wedges.

Cooking Instructions: Simmer broth, add noodles and meat.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Simmer beef bones, spices, and herbs for broth. 2. Cook rice noodles. 3. Slice raw beef thinly. 4. Assemble noodles, beef, and broth. 5. Garnish with herbs and lime.

Cooking Instructions: Marinate meat, grill, wrap in pita.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Marinate chicken or lamb with spices and yogurt. 2. Grill or roast until cooked. 3. Slice thinly. 4. Wrap in flatbread with garlic sauce and veggies. 5. Serve with pickles.

Cooking Instructions: Marinate beef, grill, serve with rice.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Thinly slice beef and marinate with soy sauce, sugar, and sesame oil. 2. Grill or sauté until caramelized. 3. Serve with rice and lettuce wraps.

Cooking Instructions: Ferment cabbage with spices.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Salt cabbage and let it sit. 2. Prepare a paste with chili powder, garlic, ginger, and fish sauce. 3. Mix cabbage with the paste. 4. Ferment for a few days. 5. Serve as a side dish.

Cooking Instructions: Fill wrappers, steam until cooked.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Prepare dumpling dough. 2. Fill with minced meat or veggies. 3. Steam or fry until cooked. 4. Serve with dipping sauce.

Cooking Instructions: Fill, pan-fry, then steam.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Prepare dumpling wrappers. 2. Fill with minced pork and veggies. 3. Pan-fry until crispy. 4. Serve with soy sauce.

Cooking Instructions: Layer eggplant & meat, bake.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Layer sliced eggplant and spiced ground meat in a baking dish. 2. Top with béchamel sauce. 3. Bake until golden. 4. Let it cool. 5. Serve warm.

Cooking Instructions: Cook meat sauce, mix with spaghetti.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Sauté onions, garlic, and ground beef. 2. Add tomatoes, herbs, and simmer. 3. Cook spaghetti. 4. Toss pasta with the sauce. 5. Serve with grated cheese.

Cooking Instructions: Layer sheets, sauce, cheese, bake.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Layer cooked pasta sheets with bolognese sauce and béchamel. 2. Repeat layers and top with cheese. 3. Bake until bubbly and golden. 4. Let it rest. 5. Serve warm.

Cooking Instructions: Toss pasta with egg mixture and pancetta.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook spaghetti. 2. Sauté pancetta or bacon. 3. Mix eggs, cheese, and pepper. 4. Toss pasta with pancetta and egg mixture. 5. Serve immediately.

Cooking Instructions: Cut, deep-fry until crispy.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cut potatoes into sticks. 2. Soak in water to remove starch. 3. Fry at 160°C until soft. 4. Increase heat to 190°C and fry until crispy. 5. Serve with ketchup.

Cooking Instructions: Cook meat on a spit, slice, serve in pita.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Marinate meat with spices and yogurt. 2. Stack on a vertical rotisserie and cook. 3. Slice thinly. 4. Serve in flatbread with veggies and sauce.

Cooking Instructions: Bread meat, pan-fry until golden.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Pound meat thin. 2. Coat with flour, egg, and breadcrumbs. 3. Fry until golden. 4. Serve with lemon wedges.

Cooking Instructions: Slow-cook beef with spices.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Sauté onions and beef. 2. Add paprika, tomatoes, and broth. 3. Simmer until tender. 4. Serve with bread or dumplings.

Cooking Instructions: Batter fish, deep-fry with fries.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Coat fish fillets in batter. 2. Fry until golden. 3. Cut potatoes into sticks and fry. 4. Serve with tartar sauce.

Cooking Instructions: Layer fries, curds, pour hot gravy.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cut potatoes into fries and fry. 2. Top with cheese curds. 3. Pour hot gravy over the fries. 4. Serve immediately.

Cooking Instructions: Shape dough, boil, bake.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Prepare dough with flour, yeast, and water. 2. Shape into rings and boil. 3. Bake until golden. 4. Serve with cream cheese or toppings.

Cooking Instructions: Mix, pour over crust, bake.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Mix crushed biscuits and butter for the base. 2. Blend cream cheese, sugar, and eggs for the filling. 3. Bake in a water bath. 4. Chill and serve.

Cooking Instructions: Cook pasta, mix with cheese sauce.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook macaroni. 2. Make a cheese sauce with butter, flour, milk, and cheese. 3. Mix with macaroni. 4. Bake until bubbly. 5. Serve hot.

Cooking Instructions: Mix lobster with mayo, serve in bun.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook and chop lobster meat. 2. Mix with mayo, lemon juice, and herbs. 3. Fill a buttered roll. 4. Serve with fries.

Cooking Instructions: Marinate beef, slow-cook.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Marinate beef in vinegar and spices for days. 2. Brown the meat and simmer in the marinade. 3. Serve with gravy and potatoes.

Cooking Instructions: Marinate fish in lime juice, serve cold.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Marinate raw fish in lime juice. 2. Add onions, cilantro, and chili. 3. Chill and serve with corn or sweet potato.

Cooking Instructions: Make dough, grill till golden.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Mix cornmeal, water, and salt into a dough. 2. Shape into discs and cook on a skillet. 3. Slice and fill with cheese or meat. 4. Serve warm.

Cooking Instructions: Fill dough, fold, bake or fry.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Prepare dough with flour and butter. 2. Fill with spiced meat or veggies. 3. Fold and seal. 4. Bake or fry until golden. 5. Serve with salsa.

Cooking Instructions: Pipe dough, fry, coat in sugar.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Boil water, butter, and flour to make dough. 2. Pipe into hot oil and fry. 3. Coat with sugar. 4. Serve with chocolate sauce.

Cooking Instructions: Roast eggplant, blend with spices.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Roast eggplant until soft. 2. Blend with tahini, garlic, and lemon juice. 3. Season with salt and olive oil. 4. Serve with pita bread.

Cooking Instructions: Toast bread, top with tomato mixture.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Toast bread slices. 2. Top with chopped tomatoes, basil, and garlic. 3. Drizzle with olive oil. 4. Serve as an appetizer.

Cooking Instructions: Roast duck, serve in pancakes.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Marinate duck with spices. 2. Roast until crispy. 3. Slice and serve with pancakes, hoisin sauce, and scallions.

Cooking Instructions: Grill skewers, serve with sauce.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Marinate meat in a spiced peanut sauce. 2. Skewer and grill. 3. Serve with peanut dipping sauce.

Cooking Instructions: Dip in batter, deep-fry.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Mix flour, egg, and ice water for batter. 2. Dip veggies or seafood in batter. 3. Fry until crispy. 4. Serve with dipping sauce.

Cooking Instructions: Cook rice with proteins and spices.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Sauté onions, bell peppers, and celery. 2. Add rice, broth, and spices. 3. Add meat and seafood. 4. Simmer until rice is cooked. 5. Serve hot.

Cooking Instructions: Boil beets, add broth, serve with cream.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook beets, cabbage, and potatoes in broth. 2. Add tomatoes and vinegar. 3. Simmer until tender. 4. Serve with sour cream.

Cooking Instructions: Fill dough, boil, then fry.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Prepare dough with flour and water. 2. Fill with mashed potatoes or cheese. 3. Boil and fry. 4. Serve with sour cream.

Cooking Instructions: Layer biscuits & cream, chill.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Layer coffee-soaked ladyfingers and mascarpone cream. 2. Dust with cocoa powder. 3. Chill for hours. 4. Serve cold.

Cooking Instructions: Whisk, bake until puffy.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Prepare a base with butter, flour, and milk. 2. Fold in whipped egg whites. 3. Bake until risen. 4. Serve immediately.

Cooking Instructions: Bake, fill with cream, coat with chocolate.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Make choux pastry and pipe into logs. 2. Bake until puffed. 3. Fill with pastry cream. 4. Top with chocolate glaze.

Cooking Instructions: Mix all ingredients, chill.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Grate cucumber and squeeze out water. 2. Mix with yogurt, garlic, and olive oil. 3. Season with salt and dill. 4. Serve as a dip.

Cooking Instructions: Steam with broth, fluff with fork.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook couscous in boiling water. 2. Fluff with a fork. 3. Add veggies, herbs, and olive oil. 4. Serve as a side dish.

Cooking Instructions: Simmer sauce, coat over meat.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Toast and blend spices, nuts, and chocolate. 2. Cook with broth until thickened. 3. Serve over chicken or rice.

Cooking Instructions: Simmer clams in creamy broth.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Sauté onions, celery, and potatoes. 2. Add clams and broth. 3. Simmer until tender. 4. Add cream and season. 5. Serve with bread.

Cooking Instructions: Boil water, add noodles & masala, cook for 2 mins.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Boil water in a pan. 2. Add Maggi noodles and cook for 2 minutes. 3. Add the tastemaker and stir. 4. Cook until the water evaporates. 5. Serve hot.

Cooking Instructions: Roast semolina, cook with tempered spices & veggies.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Roast rava (semolina) in ghee until aromatic. 2. Sauté mustard seeds, urad dal, onions, and green chilies. 3. Add water and salt, bring to a boil. 4. Add roasted rava and cook until soft. 5. Garnish with coriander leaves. Serve with chutney.

Cooking Instructions: Soak poha, sautÃˆ with spices & veggies.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Rinse flattened rice (poha) and drain. 2. Sauté mustard seeds, curry leaves, onions, and green chilies. 3. Add turmeric and poha, mix well. 4. Cook for 2-3 minutes. 5. Garnish with coriander and lemon juice. Serve hot.

Cooking Instructions: Boil eggs, cook in spiced gravy.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Boil eggs and peel them. 2. Sauté onions, tomatoes, and spices. 3. Add water and simmer to make gravy. 4. Add boiled eggs and cook for 5 minutes. 5. Garnish with coriander. Serve with rice or roti.

Cooking Instructions: Boil lentils, temper with spices.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook toor dal with turmeric and salt. 2. Temper mustard seeds, cumin seeds, garlic, and red chilies in ghee. 3. Add the tempering to the dal. 4. Garnish with coriander. 5. Serve with rice or roti.

Cooking Instructions: Cook rice & dal with veggies & spices.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook rice and moong dal with turmeric and salt. 2. Temper cumin seeds, asafoetida, and ghee. 3. Add the tempering to the khichdi. 4. Serve with curd or pickle.

Cooking Instructions: Fry potatoes with spices till crispy.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Peel and slice potatoes thinly. 2. Heat oil and fry the slices until crispy. 3. Drain excess oil and sprinkle salt and spices. 4. Cool and store in an airtight container.

Cooking Instructions: Mix sprouts with veggies & lemon juice.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Mix sprouted lentils with chopped veggies (cucumber, tomato, onion). 2. Add lemon juice, salt, and chaat masala. 3. Toss well. 4. Serve fresh.

Cooking Instructions: Cook oats with milk, top with honey & nuts.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Boil water or milk in a pan. 2. Add oats and cook until soft. 3. Add sugar or salt as per taste. 4. Garnish with nuts or fruits. 5. Serve warm.

Cooking Instructions: Toss roasted peanuts with spices & veggies.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Roast peanuts until crunchy. 2. Mix with chopped onions, tomatoes, and green chilies. 3. Add lemon juice, salt, and chaat masala. 4. Toss well. 5. Serve fresh.

Cooking Instructions: Assemble veggies & cheese between buttered bread.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Spread butter on bread slices. 2. Layer with sliced veggies (cucumber, tomato, lettuce). 3. Add green chutney or mayo. 4. Cover with another bread slice. 5. Grill or serve as is.

Cooking Instructions: Make batter, spread thin on hot pan, cook.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Mix rava, rice flour, and buttermilk into a batter. 2. Add chopped onions, green chilies, and curry leaves. 3. Heat a tawa, pour the batter, and spread thinly. 4. Cook until crispy. 5. Serve with chutney.

Cooking Instructions: Mix rice with curd, temper with spices.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook rice and let it cool. 2. Mix curd (yogurt) with the rice. 3. Temper mustard seeds, urad dal, curry leaves, and green chilies in oil. 4. Add the tempering to the curd rice. 5. Garnish with grated carrots or pomegranate seeds. Serve chilled.

Cooking Instructions: SautÃˆ spices, mix with rice & lemon juice.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook rice and let it cool. 2. Temper mustard seeds, urad dal, curry leaves, and green chilies in oil. 3. Add turmeric and lemon juice. 4. Mix with the rice. 5. Serve with papad or pickle.

Cooking Instructions: Cook rice, mix with tamarind-spiced mix.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook rice and let it cool. 2. Prepare tamarind paste with spices and jaggery. 3. Temper mustard seeds, curry leaves, and peanuts in oil. 4. Mix the tamarind paste and tempering with the rice. 5. Serve with papad or curd.

Cooking Instructions: Make batter, cook like pancakes.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Mix besan, water, and spices into a batter. 2. Pour on a hot tawa and cook like a pancake. 3. Add chopped vegetables (optional). 4. Serve with chutney.

Cooking Instructions: Mix batter, cook on a pan till golden.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Mash bananas and mix with flour, milk, and sugar. 2. Heat a pan, pour the batter, and cook until bubbles form. 3. Flip and cook the other side. 4. Serve with honey or syrup.

Cooking Instructions: Make dough, press into strings, steam.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Mix rice flour with hot water to make dough. 2. Press the dough through an idiyappam maker onto steamer plates. 3. Steam for 5-7 minutes. 4. Serve with coconut milk or curry.

Cooking Instructions: Boil eggs in water for 10 mins.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Place eggs in a pot of water. 2. Boil for 8-10 minutes. 3. Remove and cool in cold water. 4. Peel and serve with salt and pepper.

Cooking Instructions: SautÃˆ veggies, mix with cooked rice.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook rice and let it cool. 2. Sauté veggies (carrots, beans, peas) in oil. 3. Add soy sauce, vinegar, and salt. 4. Mix with the rice and cook for 2-3 minutes. 5. Serve hot.

Cooking Instructions: Blend cooked tomatoes, season & simmer.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Boil tomatoes with water and blend into a puree. 2. Strain and cook with salt and pepper. 3. Add butter or cream. 4. Garnish with croutons or coriander. 5. Serve hot.

Cooking Instructions: Spread garlic butter, toast till crispy.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Mix butter, garlic, and herbs. 2. Spread on bread slices. 3. Bake or toast until golden. 4. Serve hot.

Cooking Instructions: Fry/roast papad, top with spiced veggies.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Roast papad on a flame or in a microwave. 2. Top with chopped onions, tomatoes, and spices. 3. Add a squeeze of lemon juice. 4. Serve as a snack.

Cooking Instructions: Mix, fry in hot oil till crisp.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Mix sliced onions with besan, spices, and water. 2. Heat oil and drop spoonfuls of the mixture. 3. Fry until golden brown. 4. Drain excess oil. 5. Serve with chutney.

Cooking Instructions: Serve cornflakes with milk & honey.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Pour cornflakes into a bowl. 2. Add cold or warm milk. 3. Add sugar or fruits (optional). 4. Serve immediately.

Cooking Instructions: Mix with roasted peanuts & masala.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Dry roast puffed rice in a pan. 2. Mix with chopped onions, tomatoes, and green chilies. 3. Add lemon juice, salt, and chaat masala. 4. Toss well. 5. Serve fresh.

Ingredients: Wheat flour, potato/paneer stuffing, ghee, curd/pickle
Cooking Instructions: Stuff dough, roll, cook on pan.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Prepare dough with wheat flour and water. 2. Stuff with spiced potato or paneer mixture. 3. Roll into discs and cook on a tawa. 4. Brush with ghee. 5. Serve with curd or pickle.

Cooking Instructions: Scramble eggs with spices.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Sauté onions, tomatoes, and green chilies. 2. Beat eggs and pour into the pan. 3. Scramble until cooked. 4. Garnish with coriander. 5. Serve with roti or bread.

Cooking Instructions: Cook rice with veggies & whole spices.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Sauté whole spices, onions, and veggies in oil. 2. Add rice and water. 3. Cook until the rice is done. 4. Garnish with coriander. 5. Serve with raita.

Cooking Instructions: Soak sabudana, cook with peanuts & spices.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Soak sabudana for 2-3 hours. 2. Temper cumin seeds, green chilies, and peanuts in oil. 3. Add sabudana and cook until translucent. 4. Add salt and lemon juice. 5. Serve hot.

Cooking Instructions: Fill tortilla with veggies, wrap.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Spread green chutney or mayo on a tortilla. 2. Layer with sliced veggies and paneer. 3. Roll tightly. 4. Grill or serve as is.

Cooking Instructions: Crumble paneer, cook with spices.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Crumble paneer and sauté with onions, tomatoes, and spices. 2. Cook until dry. 3. Garnish with coriander. 4. Serve with roti or paratha.

Cooking Instructions: Chop fruits, mix with honey & lemon.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Chop mixed fruits (apple, banana, grapes, etc.). 2. Add honey or yogurt. 3. Toss well. 4. Chill and serve.

Cooking Instructions: Butter bread, grill with cheese inside.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Spread butter on bread slices. 2. Add cheese slices. 3. Grill until the cheese melts. 4. Serve hot.

Cooking Instructions: Boil noodles, mix in masala.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Boil water and add noodles. 2. Cook for 2-3 minutes. 3. Add the tastemaker and stir. 4. Serve hot.

Cooking Instructions: Blend all together till smooth.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Blend milk, ice cream, and fruits. 2. Pour into a glass. 3. Top with whipped cream (optional). 4. Serve chilled.

Cooking Instructions: Cook beaten eggs with butter.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Beat eggs with salt and pepper. 2. Cook in a pan with butter. 3. Scramble until soft and fluffy. 4. Serve with toast.

Cooking Instructions: Blend yogurt & fruits till smooth.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Blend yogurt, fruits, and honey. 2. Add ice cubes (optional). 3. Pour into a glass. 4. Serve chilled.

Cooking Instructions: Cook pasta, mix with veggies & dressing.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook pasta and let it cool. 2. Mix with chopped veggies and dressing. 3. Toss well. 4. Chill and serve.

Cooking Instructions: Stir-fry veggies with garlic & sauce.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Sauté veggies (broccoli, carrots, bell peppers) in oil. 2. Add soy sauce and spices. 3. Cook until tender. 4. Serve hot.

Cooking Instructions: Cook rice in milk, add sugar & nuts.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook rice with milk and sugar. 2. Add cardamom and nuts. 3. Simmer until thickened. 4. Serve warm or cold.

Ingredients: Bread slices, eggs, onions, tomatoes, green chilies, salt, pepper, butter, coriander leaves
Cooking Instructions: Beat eggs with spices, cook on a pan, place bread inside, fold, and serve
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Beat eggs with salt, pepper, chopped onions, tomatoes, and green chilies. 2. Heat butter in a pan, pour the egg mixture. 3. Place bread slices on top and cook. 4. Flip, fold, and serve hot.

Cooking Instructions: Blend grated coconut with warm water, strain, and extract milk
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Blend grated coconut with warm water. 2. Strain using a muslin cloth or fine sieve. 3. Collect the milk and use as needed. 4. Sweeten if desired.

Ingredients: Pearl millet (kambu), buttermilk, salt, small onions
Cooking Instructions: Cook millet, cool, mix with buttermilk and onions
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Wash and cook pearl millet in water until soft. 2. Allow it to cool, mash well. 3. Mix with buttermilk, salt, and chopped onions. 4. Serve chilled.

Ingredients: Finger millet flour (ragi), water, buttermilk, salt
Cooking Instructions: Cook ragi flour into a porridge, cool, mix with buttermilk
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Mix ragi flour with water and cook until thick. 2. Allow to cool and set. 3. Mix with buttermilk and salt. 4. Serve chilled.

Ingredients: Milk, sugar, cream, vanilla extract (or flavor of choice)
Cooking Instructions: Blend ingredients, freeze until set
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Mix milk, sugar, and cream in a bowl. 2. Add vanilla or any preferred flavor. 3. Blend well and pour into a container. 4. Freeze for at least 4 hours. 5. Scoop and serve.

Cooking Instructions: Cook rice in milk, add sugar & spices.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Cook rice with milk and sugar. 2. Add cardamom and nuts. 3. Simmer until thickened. 4. Serve warm or cold.

Cooking Instructions: Blend all together till creamy.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Blend bananas, milk, and honey. 2. Add ice cubes (optional). 3. Pour into a glass. 4. Serve chilled.

Cooking Instructions: Blend mango with yogurt & sugar.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Blend mango pulp, yogurt, and sugar. 2. Add ice cubes (optional). 3. Pour into a glass. 4. Serve chilled.

Cooking Instructions: Grate cucumber, mix with yogurt & spices.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Grate cucumber and squeeze out water. 2. Mix with yogurt, salt, and roasted cumin. 3. Serve chilled.

Ingredients: Milk, rose syrup, sugar, cardamom (optional), ice cubes
Cooking Instructions: Mix rose syrup and sugar with chilled milk
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Take chilled milk in a glass. 2. Add rose syrup and sugar. 3. Mix well until combined. 4. Add ice cubes and serve chilled.

Ingredients: Milk, almonds (badam), sugar, saffron, cardamom powder
Cooking Instructions: Blend almonds into a paste and mix with warm milk and sugar
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Soak almonds in warm water for 30 minutes and peel the skin. 2. Grind almonds into a smooth paste with little milk. 3. Heat milk in a pan and add almond paste, sugar, saffron, and cardamom powder. 4. Simmer for 5 minutes while stirring. 5. Serve warm or chilled.

Ingredients: Nannari syrup, lemon juice, sugar, cold water, ice cubes
Cooking Instructions: Mix nannari syrup, lemon juice, and sugar in cold water
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Take a glass of cold water. 2. Add nannari syrup and sugar. 3. Mix well until sugar dissolves. 4. Add lemon juice and ice cubes. 5. Serve chilled.

Ingredients: Eggs, sugar, cardamom powder, ghee, flour (optional)
Cooking Instructions: Beat eggs with sugar and cook in ghee until fluffy
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Beat eggs with sugar until fluffy. 2. Heat ghee in a pan and add the egg mixture. 3. Stir continuously on low flame. 4. Add cardamom powder and cook until thick. 5. Cut into pieces and serve.

Ingredients: Milk, custard powder, sugar, vanilla essence, chopped fruits (banana, apple, mango, pomegranate)
Cooking Instructions: Cook custard powder with milk and sugar, then chill and mix with fruits
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Mix custard powder with a little milk to form a smooth paste. 2. Boil the remaining milk and add sugar. 3. Add the custard paste and stir continuously. 4. Simmer until thick and smooth. 5. Let it cool, then refrigerate. 6. Add chopped fruits before serving.

Cooking Instructions: Blend cooked tomatoes with spices.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Sauté tomatoes, onions, and spices. 2. Blend into a smooth paste. 3. Temper mustard seeds and curry leaves in oil. 4. Add the tempering to the chutney. 5. Serve with dosa or idli.

Cooking Instructions: Fill roti with stuffing, roll.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Spread green chutney on a roti. 2. Add sliced veggies or paneer. 3. Roll tightly. 4. Grill or serve as is.

Cooking Instructions: Marinate paneer, grill, wrap in roti.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Marinate paneer cubes with spices and yogurt. 2. Grill or bake until charred. 3. Spread chutney on a tortilla. 4. Add paneer tikka and veggies. 5. Roll tightly and serve.

Ingredients: Chicken, Butter, Tomato, Cream, Spices, Garlic, Ginger
Cooking Instructions: Marinate chicken with yogurt and spices, cook in butter, add tomato gravy and cream.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Marinate chicken with spices and yogurt. 2. Grill or bake the chicken. 3. Sauté onions, ginger, garlic, and tomatoes. 4. Blend into a smooth gravy, add butter and cream. 5. Add grilled chicken and simmer. Serve with naan or rice.

Ingredients: Chickpeas, Flour, Yogurt, Spices, Oil, Onions, Tomatoes
Cooking Instructions: Soak chickpeas, cook with spices; knead dough, roll and deep-fry Bhature.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Soak chickpeas overnight and pressure cook. 2. Sauté onions, tomatoes, and chole masala. 3. Add cooked chickpeas and simmer. 4. For bhature, knead maida, yogurt, and baking soda into a dough. 5. Roll into discs and deep fry. Serve together.

Ingredients: Black Lentils, Kidney Beans, Butter, Cream, Spices, Garlic
Cooking Instructions: Soak lentils overnight, cook with tomatoes, cream, and butter, simmer for a rich taste.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Soak urad dal and rajma overnight, then pressure cook. 2. Sauté onions, tomatoes, ginger, and garlic. 3. Add cooked dal, cream, and butter. 4. Simmer for 30 minutes. 5. Garnish with coriander. Serve with naan or rice.

Ingredients: Paneer, Yogurt, Spices, Bell Peppers, Onions, Garlic
Cooking Instructions: Marinate paneer with yogurt and spices, grill or bake until golden.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Marinate paneer cubes with spices, yogurt, and ginger-garlic paste. 2. Skewer with vegetables like capsicum and onions. 3. Grill or bake until charred. 4. Serve with mint chutney.

Ingredients: Kidney Beans, Rice, Onions, Tomatoes, Garlic, Spices
Cooking Instructions: Soak kidney beans, pressure cook with spices, serve with steamed rice.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Soak rajma overnight and pressure cook. 2. Sauté onions, tomatoes, and rajma masala. 3. Add cooked rajma and simmer. 4. Cook rice separately. 5. Serve rajma with steamed rice.

Ingredients: Besan (Gram Flour), Yogurt, Spices, Curry Leaves, Oil
Cooking Instructions: Make gram flour batter, fry pakoras, cook in yogurt-based curry.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Mix besan and yogurt to make kadhi. 2. Add turmeric, salt, and water. 3. For pakoras, mix besan with spices and deep fry. 4. Boil kadhi, add pakoras, and simmer. 5. Temper with mustard seeds and curry leaves. Serve with rice.

Ingredients: Wheat Flour, Potatoes, Spices, Ghee, Coriander
Cooking Instructions: Stuff wheat dough with spiced mashed potatoes, roll and roast with ghee.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Boil and mash potatoes. 2. Add spices and mix well. 3. Stuff the mixture into wheat dough balls. 4. Roll into parathas and cook on a tawa with ghee. 5. Serve with curd or pickle.

Ingredients: Wheat Flour, Yogurt, Salt, Baking Soda, Butter
Cooking Instructions: Knead flour dough, roll, cook in a tandoor or on a hot griddle.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Knead wheat flour, water, and salt into a dough. 2. Roll into thin discs. 3. Cook on a tawa and finish in a tandoor or oven. 4. Brush with butter. 5. Serve with curry.

Ingredients: Okra (Bhindi), Tomatoes, Onions, Spices, Mustard Seeds
Cooking Instructions: Stir-fry okra with onions, tomatoes, and spices until well cooked.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Sauté bhindi (okra) in oil until crispy. 2. Add chopped onions, tomatoes, and spices. 3. Cook until the masala thickens. 4. Garnish with coriander. 5. Serve with roti or rice.

Ingredients: Paneer, Cashews, Cream, Tomato Puree, Spices, Butter

Ingredients: Gram Flour, Paneer, Potatoes, Spices, Cream, Tomatoes

Ingredients: Eggplant, Tomatoes, Onions, Spices, Garlic, Mustard Seeds
Cooking Instructions: Roast eggplant, mash with spices, onions, tomatoes, and garlic.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Roast eggplant until soft. 2. Peel and mash the eggplant. 3. Sauté onions, tomatoes, and spices. 4. Add mashed eggplant and cook. 5. Garnish with coriander. Serve with roti.

Ingredients: Besan (Gram Flour), Yogurt, Spices, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves

Ingredients: Paneer, Peas, Tomatoes, Onions, Spices, Cream

Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Sauté onions, tomatoes, and spices. 2. Add peas and paneer cubes. 3. Cook until the gravy thickens. 4. Garnish with coriander. 5. Serve with roti or rice.

Cooking Instructions: Knead gram flour with spices, roll and cook on a tawa.
Step-by-Step Cooking Guide: 1. Mix besan, wheat flour, and spices. 2. Knead into a dough with water. 3. Roll into discs and cook on a tawa. 4. Brush with ghee. 5. Serve with curd or pickle.
